name: Healthy Veggie Sandwich
recipeIngredient: 2 slice Monterey Jack or Cheddar cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread mayonnaise on one side of each bread slice. Set the top two slices aside.
2. Mash the avocado with lemon juice and spread on two slices of bread. Sprinkle with parsley.
3. Top with cheese slices. Lay half of the roasted pepper on the cheese.
4. Cover with cucumber and tomato slices. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Top each with sprouts, cover with the top slices of bread, and cut into halves. Wrap them up.
Nutritional Information: per sandwich: 384 calories, 21g fat, 25 mg cholesterol
Dallas Morning News -- Sunday insert Parade Magazine September 24, 1995
Posted by The WEE Scot -- paul macGregor
From: Iris Grayson Date: 07-19-96
